name: Harvest Pumpkin Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Cream butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
3. Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
4. Stir in soda, cinnamon, salt, nutmeg, ginger, and cloves.
5. Mix in pumpkin until combined.
6. Fold in chocolate chips and walnuts (if using).
7. Grease the bottom of two 9x5 inch loaf pans.
8. Pour batter into prepared pans.
9. Bake for 65-75 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
